ab: ’lyan kisa ga, mosa mwah sali sswe mu likuy la.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: cami uya mu ga mosa myan bbisan rami bayi welung, lama myan tmahok ble ni’un gbyan wahan mani sswe mu likuy.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐等弟弟回來吃。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: mhenas myan bisan rami ga, babaw bisan rami ga piyux ci rami nhbyat micu.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，菜攤上有好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: bayi cami kanrang, warang ru kmi.
ch: 我們買了甘藍菜、蕃茄和大黃瓜。
en: We bought Kale, Tomatoes and Cucumbers.

ab: kmayan tbayi bisan bbway haca maha, cbing ci ongray ru yimux mu, bayi cikah!
ch: 水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜，買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: mhenas myan bisan syang ga, kmayan tbayi maha, lalu bisun su? hopa ru msyang ci welung nya soni, utux ga tugan kbhun pila.
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today’s chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: knita na uya mu ga hmet ci la, kyalun nya tbayi maha hmway cikah.
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: ana ga kmayan tbayi haca maha waya hmway ci la, iyat mu hetun pila la.
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: kmayan tbayi cyu maki syaw haca maha, uwah bayi ’cyux mu, hopa ru hmway ci ’cyux mu.
ch: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: puting ci ga waya myan bayi welung ru ’cyux, tehok sali lga utux hanray ni’an rrami waya myan puyun.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: bsya ci mnaga cami, memaw mku’ung kayan la.
ch: 我們等了好久，天都已經黑了。
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: mwah rengwa sswe likuy maha, nyu siy tbah ini hngaw hetay la, babaw ’nyan hngawan ryax ga yaca thoyay cu mwah sali.
ch: 弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn’t take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: kmayan uya mu maha piyux ci tnahok ta rrami la, sgiy kwara c’oli uwah s’un mani.
ch: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多菜，叫大家一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let’s eat together!

ab: tpihun myan glu ru llpyung, uwah ms’un mani piyux ci nni’un na kgabi hani.
ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
